attempts.agent_commands:
from pycbc.filter import resample_to_delta_t, highpass, matched_filter
from pycbc.psd import welch, interpolate
from pycbc.waveform import get_td_waveform
import pycbc.psd

strain = read_frame('/root/data/PyCBC_T2_2.gwf', 'H1:TEST-STRAIN')
strain = resample_to_delta_t(strain, 1.0/2048)
strain = highpass(strain, 15.0)
strain = strain.crop(2, 2)
seg_len = int(strain.sample_rate * 4)
psd = welch(strain, seg_len=seg_len, seg_stride=seg_len//2)
psd = interpolate(psd, strain.delta_f)
psd = pycbc.psd.inverse_spectrum_truncation(psd, seg_len, low_frequency_cutoff=20.0, trunc_method='hann')

N = len(strain)
delta_f = strain.delta_f
delta_t = strain.delta_t

t0 = time.time()
hp_td, _ = get_td_waveform(approximant='TaylorT4', mass1=20, mass2=20,
                             delta_t=float(delta_t), f_lower=20.0)
if len(hp_td) < N:
    hp_td.append_zeros(N - len(hp_td))
else:
    hp_td = hp_td[:N]
hp_fd = hp_td.to_frequencyseries(delta_f=delta_f)
hp_fd.resize(N // 2 + 1)
snr_ts = matched_filter(hp_fd, strain, psd=psd, low_frequency_cutoff=20.0)
snr_ts = snr_ts.crop(2, 2)
peak = abs(snr_ts).numpy().max()
t1 = time.time()
print(f'TaylorT4 single template: {t1-t0:.2f}s, SNR={peak:.3f}')
print(f'496 templates estimate: {496*(t1-t0)/60:.1f} min')

t0 = time.time()
from pycbc.waveform import get_td_waveform
hp_td, _ = get_td_waveform(approximant='SEOBNRv4_opt', mass1=20, mass2=20,
                             delta_t=float(delta_t), f_lower=20.0)
if len(hp_td) < N:
    hp_td.append_zeros(N - len(hp_td))
else:
    hp_td = hp_td[:N]
hp_fd = hp_td.to_frequencyseries(delta_f=delta_f)
hp_fd.resize(N // 2 + 1)
snr_ts = matched_filter(hp_fd, strain, psd=psd, low_frequency_cutoff=20.0)
snr_ts = snr_ts.crop(2, 2)
peak = abs(snr_ts).numpy().max()
t1 = time.time()
print(f'SEOBNRv4_opt single template: {t1-t0:.2f}s, SNR={peak:.3f}')
print(f'496 templates estimate: {496*(t1-t0)/60:.1f} min')
\" 2>&1"
cd /root && timeout 1400 python3 run_mf2.py 2>&1
cat /root/detection_results.csv
